qa_pair.question: In React Flow v12 (@xyflow/react), the v11 instance method that converted a screen-space pointer position to flow-space coordinates was called `project`. What is its v12 replacement?
In React Flow v12, the v11 node field `parentNode` was renamed. What is the new field name in v12?
In React Flow v12, what is the maintained npm package name for dagre that should be used in the auto-layout recipe (instead of the unmaintained legacy `dagre` package)?
In Svelte Flow (@xyflow/svelte), what is the equivalent component name for React Flow's `EdgeLabelRenderer`?
In React Flow v12, after dynamically adding or removing handles on a custom node, which hook must be called with the node's id to make the library re-measure handle positions?
In React Flow v12, reading a node's measured DOM width is no longer done via `node.width`. What is the v12 property path?

The reactflow-mcp `node_position_animation` recipe says CSS `transition: transform` does NOT work for animating React Flow node positions. Which npm package does the recipe use instead to interpolate positions per-frame?
In React Flow v12, what is the boolean prop name on `proOptions` that hides the bottom-right attribution badge?
The reactflow-mcp `libavoid_orthogonal_routing` recipe wraps an obstacle-aware edge router that ships as a WASM module. What is the exact npm package name used in the recipe?
In React Flow v12 sub-flows, when a node has a `parentId` field referencing another node, what is the hard ordering requirement for those two nodes inside the `nodes` array?
qa_pair.answer: The parent node must come before the child node in the array.
